subject: Re: (no subject)
body:
no problem

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> Since my vacation with Michelle ended so horribly, I
> was hoping to take her  
> away for the weekend.  Would you mind if I worked
> from home tomorrow and  
> checked out early, so I could be on the road before
> the traffic gets  ridiculous?  
> Please let me know.  Thanks.
>

no problem

from home tomorrow and
checked out early, so I could be on the road before
the traffic gets ridiculous?
Please let me know. Thanks.
